items.title: Strengthening Passenger Facilitation in Indian Aviation
items.snippet: Press Release:Press Information Bureau Ministry of Civil Aviation Strengthening Passenger Facilitation in Indian Aviation Posted On: 18 MAR 2026 8:56AM by PIB Delhi India has emerged as the third-largest domestic aviation market globally, with air travel becoming increasingly accessible and inclusive under the UDAN scheme. Indian airports today handle over five lakh passengers daily, reflecting the rapid growth of th…
